headline: Pfizer Beats Sales Estimates As $17 Billion Patent Cliff Looms
summary: Pfizer topped first-quarter expectations, reaffirmed 2026 guidance, and faces pressure to prove future growth beyond Covid products.

headline: Merck Stock Looks Undervalued as KEYTRUDA Growth and Pipeline Offset Near-Term Headwinds
summary: Merck (NYSE:MRK) delivered its fourth consecutive earnings beat, but shares slipped on the earnings report. With acquisition charges clouding the quarter, here is where the stock heads next. headline: Harley-Davidson, USAA, The Home Depot and FedEx Named Among America’s Most Patriotic Companies 2026 by Newsweek
summary: NEW YORK, May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Newsweek, in partnership with Plant-A Insights Group, today announced its list of America’s Most Patriotic Companies 2026, recognizing organizations that demonstrate outstanding commitment to the United States through corporate responsibility, community engagement, and support for American values. headline: Merck Completes Acquisition of Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: RAHWAY, N.J., May 05, 2026--Merck (NYSE: MRK), known as MSD outside of the United States and Canada, today announced the successful completion of the acquisition of Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc. ("Terns") (Nasdaq: TERN).
